mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(b_writer,b_title,b_pw,b_content,m_code,ref,re_step,re_level,b_upload) VALUES(#{b_writer},#{b_title},#{b_pw},#{b_content},#{m_code}, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(b.ref)+1,1) FROM board b),1,1,#{b_upload})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board ORDER BY ref DESC, re_step ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.m_code = m.m_code WHERE b.ref = #{ref} AND b.re_level > 1 AND m.m_email = 'admin@resort.com'
SELECT * FROM board WHERE ref IN ( SELECT ref FROM board WHERE m_code = #{m_code} AND re_level = 1 ) ORDER BY ref DESC, re_step ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET readcount = readcount+1 WHERE b_code=#{b_code}
UPDATE board SET b_writer=#{b_writer}, b_title=#{b_title}, b_content=#{b_content}, b_upload=#{b_upload}, b_update=NOW() WHERE b_code=#{b_code}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board
b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT * FROM board
b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ref DESC, re_step ASC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(m_code,b_writer,b_title, b_pw, ref, re_step, re_level, b_content,b_upload) VALUES(#{m_code},#{b_writer},#{b_title},#{b_pw},#{ref},#{re_step},#{re_level},#{b_content},#{b_upload})
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET re_step = re_step + 1 WHERE ref = #{ref} AND re_step > #{re_step}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ref) FROM board WHERE ref IN ( SELECT ref FROM board WHERE m_code = #{m_code} AND re_level = 1 )
AND b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT * FROM board WHERE ref IN ( SELECT ref FROM board WHERE m_code = #{m_code} AND re_level = 1 )
AND b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ref DESC, re_step ASC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE re_step = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE re_step = 1
b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM board WHERE re_step = 1 ORDER BY ref DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM board WHERE re_step = 1
b_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
b_writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY ref DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
